title: Inline template name editing and delete with confirmation

requirements.text: Add a backend function to update the name of an existing workout template by its ID. The function must validate that the caller owns the template and return an error if the template is not found.

quotes: Id like the ability to edit template name

acceptanceCriteria: A new updateWorkoutTemplateName(id, newName) function exists in the backend actor
Returns ok if the update succeeds
Returns an error variant if the template is not found or the caller is not the owner

requirements.text: Add a backend function to delete an existing workout template by its ID. The function must validate that the caller owns the template and return an error if the template is not found.
acceptanceCriteria: A new deleteWorkoutTemplate(id) function exists in the backend actor
Returns ok if the deletion succeeds
Returns an error variant if the template is not found or the caller is not the owner

requirements.text: Create a useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName mutation hook that calls the backend updateWorkoutTemplateName function and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook file exists at frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName.ts
Calls the backend actor's updateWorkoutTemplateName with the template ID and new name
Invalidates allWorkoutTemplates query on success

requirements.text: Create a useDeleteWorkoutTemplate mutation hook that calls the backend deleteWorkoutTemplate function and invalidates the allWorkoutTemplates query on success.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook file exists at frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteWorkoutTemplate.ts
Calls the backend actor's deleteWorkoutTemplate with the template ID
Invalidates allWorkoutTemplates query on success

requirements.text: In the TemplateLibraryPage (on-chain templates) template list view, make each template name clickable to enter inline edit mode: clicking the name replaces it with a text input pre-filled with the current name. Pressing Enter or clicking away saves the change via the useUpdateWorkoutTemplateName hook. Pressing Escape cancels the edit. Show a loading indicator while saving and a toast on success or failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a template name in the list switches it to an editable text input
The input is pre-filled with the current template name
Pressing Enter commits the change and exits edit mode
Clicking outside (onBlur) commits the change and exits edit mode
Pressing Escape cancels the edit without saving
A loading state is shown while the mutation is in flight
A success toast is shown when the name is updated
An error toast is shown if the update fails

requirements.text: In the TemplateLibraryPage (on-chain templates) template list view, add a Delete button next to each template. Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog asking the user to confirm before permanently removing the template. Confirming triggers the useDeleteWorkoutTemplate mutation. Show a toast on success or failure.
acceptanceCriteria: A Delete button is visible for each template in the list
Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog with a clear warning message
Confirming in the dialog calls the deleteWorkoutTemplate mutation
Cancelling the dialog closes it without deleting
A success toast is shown when the template is deleted
An error toast is shown if the deletion fails
The deleted template is removed from the list after successful deletion

requirements.text: In the LocalTemplatesPage (localStorage templates), make each template name support inline editing by clicking on it. Clicking the name replaces it with a text input pre-filled with the current name. Pressing Enter or clicking away saves the change via the useLocalTemplates update mutation. Pressing Escape cancels the edit.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a local template name in the list switches it to an editable text input
The input is pre-filled with the current template name
Pressing Enter commits the change and exits edit mode
Clicking outside (onBlur) commits the change and exits edit mode
Pressing Escape cancels the edit without saving

requirements.text: In the LocalTemplatesPage (localStorage templates), add a Delete button next to each template. Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog. Confirming permanently removes the template from localStorage via the useLocalTemplates delete mutation.
acceptanceCriteria: A Delete button is visible for each local template in the list
Clicking Delete opens a confirmation dialog
Confirming deletes the template from localStorage
Cancelling the dialog closes it without deleting
The deleted template is removed from the list after successful deletion

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Confirmation dialogs must use existing Shadcn UI dialog/alert-dialog components
nonGoals: Editing any template fields other than the name (e.g., exercises, days)
Bulk delete of multiple templates at once
